args: for root in "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${TALA_SOURCE_ROOT:-}" "$(pwd -P)/plugins/tala-project-tracker" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache"/*/tala-project-tracker/* "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/.tmp/marketplaces"/*/plugins/tala-project-tracker; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -x "$root/scripts/tala-mcp-stdio.sh" ]; then exec "$root/scripts/tala-mcp-stdio.sh" "$@"; fi; done; printf '%s\n' 'Unable to locate Tala plugin files. Set PLUGIN_ROOT, set TALA_SOURCE_ROOT, or install tala-project-tracker in Codex.' >&2; exit 1
